title: Tinker's Masonry
description: An addon datapack for modded stone variants for Tinker's Construct
body:
Much like the other datapack, except its for stone variants instead of wood

Requires a _resource pack: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arizs-tinkering-resources](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/arizs-tinkering-resources)_

Currently supported:
- Unearthed(discontinued support, just leftovers from the development days)
- Create
- Oh The Biomes You'll Go
- Quark
- Twigs
